gaps.description: Docker deployment (Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, setup.sh) present in install/
Hardware detection (GPU/memory/arch) for Apple Silicon / NVIDIA / CPU-only
Hardware-adaptive model selection wired through optimizer.js into llm.js loadConfig()
LLM runtime with local Ollama + cloud fallback (OpenAI/Anthropic)
STT/TTS adaptive runtime with hardware-based provider selection
Memory module with vector embedding (agentic-store + embed.js)
Admin UI and client voice UI (Vue 3 + Vite)
Remote profiles.json fetch with local cache — CDN URL configured but fallback to default.json not verified (M84 task pending)
Multi-device session coordination (joinSession/broadcastSession) implemented; deep cross-device brain state sharing minimal (M80 active)
Wake word server-side pipeline: sense.js startWakeWordPipeline() is a stub — no real mic/audio capture on server (M80 active)
HTTPS via httpsServer.js + cert.js exists; LAN tunnel via tunnel.js present but completeness unverified (M76 active)
VAD client-side composable exists; server-side VAD integration missing (M76 active)
npx agentic-service one-command startup — cli/setup.js exists but bin entrypoint not verified (M84 task pending)
agentic-store, agentic-voice, agentic-sense wired as external packages — in progress (M84 active, some tasks blocked)
Test suite: 119 failing tests under repair (M83 active, 3/6 tasks done, TTS import path fix blocking 2 tasks)
Voice latency <2s end-to-end (STT+LLM+TTS) not benchmarked or enforced in code
CPU profiling / performance instrumentation for latency measurement absent
